Fields.Name: Lower FPS Threshold - Raise Balance Level
Fields.Description: If it falls below this FPS, increase the load balance level by 1.

Fields.Name: Upper FPS Threshold - Lower Balance Level
Fields.Description: If you exceed this FPS, lower the load balance level by 1.

Fields.Name: Lower FPS Continous - Raise Balance Level
Fields.Description: If this frame continues below the threshold, level up

Fields.Name: Upper FPS Continous - Lower Balance Level
Fields.Description: If the threshold is exceeded continuously for this frame, level down

Fields.Name: Sleep Frame Count after Level Lower
Fields.Description: Sleep frame count after level down

Fields.Name: Sleep Frame Count after Level Raise
Fields.Description: Sleep frame count after leveling up

Fields.Name: Post Process Motion Blur Iteration
Fields.Description: Reduce the number of Motion Blur iterations

Fields.Name: Halve SFX Particle
Fields.Description: Emit interval, number of emits, LOD distance halved in graphics config

Fields.Name: Omit SFX Distortion
Fields.Description: Omit of distortion applied by SFX

Fields.Name: SFX Scale - Render Distance Scale
Fields.Description: Scale to the distance judgment of the effect dynamically registered in the reduction buffer by the distance of SFX

Fields.Name: Halve Shadow Cascade [0] Resolution
Fields.Description: Cut the shadow (cascade 0) resolution in half

Fields.Name: Halve Shadow Cascade [1] Resolution
Fields.Description: Cut the shadow (cascade 1) resolution in half

Fields.Name: Disable Wetness for Player
Fields.Description: Turn off the water wetting process for local players

Fields.Name: Disable Wetness for Remote Player
Fields.Description: Turn off the water wetting process of the remote player

Fields.Name: Disable Wetness for NPC
Fields.Description: Turn off the water wetting process of enemy characters
